title: muhlenbergia distichophylla
intro: Muhlenbergia distichophylla, also known as Deer Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia distichophylla include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be cautioned due to limited research and potential interactions with other medications.
